title: Build Admin Panel for Product Management

requirements.summary: Add a protected Admin page at /admin with product management interface including product list table, add/edit/delete functionality with forms and confirmation prompts
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin renders the Admin Panel page
All existing products are listed in a table with name, category, price, stock, and featured columns
Clicking 'Add Product' opens a form/modal with all required fields (name, category, description, price, imageUrl, stock, featured)
Submitting the Add Product form calls the backend addProduct method and the product list refreshes
Clicking 'Edit' on a product pre-fills the form with that product's current values
Submitting the Edit form calls the backend updateProduct method and the list reflects the changes
Clicking 'Delete' on a product shows a confirmation prompt; confirming calls the backend deleteProduct method and removes the product from the list
Form validation prevents submission with missing required fields
Success and error states are communicated via toast notifications

file_operations.description: Add a new route for /admin that renders the AdminPage component, nested under the root layout route
Add an 'Admin' navigation link in the desktop and mobile navigation menus that points to /admin

Create the Admin Panel page component that displays a product management interface with a heading, an 'Add Product' button, and the ProductTable component. Handle loading and error states when fetching products using the useProducts query hook

Create a table component that displays all products with columns for name, category, price, stock, featured status, and action buttons (Edit, Delete). Each row includes Edit and Delete buttons that trigger the appropriate modals/dialogs. Use shadcn/ui Table components for consistent styling

Create a reusable dialog component for adding and editing products. Include form fields for name (text), category (select or text), description (textarea), price (number), imageUrl (text), stock (number), and featured (checkbox). Implement form validation to ensure required fields are filled. Use controlled inputs with React state. Accept props for mode ('add' or 'edit'), initial product data (for edit mode), and callbacks for submit and cancel. On submit, call the appropriate backend method (addProduct or updateProduct) via mutation hooks and show toast notifications for success or error

Create a confirmation dialog component that displays when the user clicks Delete on a product. Show the product name and ask for confirmation before calling the backend deleteProduct method via mutation hook. Display success or error toast notifications after the operation completes

Add three new mutation hooks: useAddProduct (calls backend addProduct method with product fields and invalidates products query on success), useUpdateProduct (calls backend updateProduct method with product ID and updated fields and invalidates products query on success), and useDeleteProduct (calls backend deleteProduct method with product ID and invalidates products query on success). Each mutation should handle success and error states appropriately
